name: Phantom Hands [ABDL]
description:
While it may be fun to play around with the supernatural, don’t get upset if the supernatural plays back. Especially if they choose to baby you...

I know of how much people are really into magical disembodied hands just being dominant and controlling, though I only partially understand the concept.

I have discord... I would like new friends please... dr.chaosblackvoid (No harassment please...)
